services.title: Digital Services
services.description: We don’t use templates. We understand your vision and create technological experiences with intention, quality, and unquestionable aesthetics.

web.title: Web Design & Development
web.desc: Your space on the internet, built from scratch. Websites, applications, and digital catalogs tailored to your business — no templates, no shortcuts.

digital.title: Business Digitalization
digital.desc: You have a business that works, lifelong clients, and a quality product — but you don't exist on the internet. We change that.

events.title: Digital Invitations & Experiences
events.desc: For weddings, quinceañeras, graduations, and events that deserve to be remembered. Every animated invitation is designed with the same intention as the event it celebrates.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.desc: You don't know where to start — that is exactly the starting point. We sit with you, understand your business, and tell you exactly what you need.

hero.title: About Sigil
hero.p1: There are businesses that have been running well for years — with lifelong clients, quality products, real history — but on the internet they simply do not exist.
hero.p2: Sigil was born to change that.
hero.p3: We are a digital studio from the Isthmus of Tehuantepec specialized in giving real internet presence to local businesses and creating digital experiences for events that deserve to be remembered. We develop websites, applications, digital catalogs, and animated invitations — each custom-built, with intention, without generic templates.
hero.p4: We are not a large agency or a self-service app. We are the ally that sits with you, understands your business, and translates what you already have into something the world can see.
hero.p5: If you have a business in the Isthmus and you are not yet on the internet, or if you are looking for a digital invitation that matches your event — this is the right place.

hero.title: Let's build something great.
hero.subtitle: Whether you have a specific project in mind or just want to explore possibilities, I'm always open to discussing new opportunities.
